description: Playground landing page: the scenario navigation and first scenario view
steps: Load the page, read the visible scenario, take a snapshot and screenshot

description: Fixed, non-adaptive layout that does not respond to narrow viewports
steps: Open the fixed-layout scenario, resize to a mobile viewport, check for horizontal overflow

description: Hard-coded light theme that ignores the user's color-scheme preference
steps: Open the no-dark-mode scenario and compare rendering under light vs dark preference

description: Custom controls with focus outlines removed; not keyboard-reachable/visible
steps: Open the poor-focus scenario and Tab through the controls, observing focus indication

description: Content that injects late without reserved space, shifting layout (CLS)
steps: Open the layout-shift scenario, observe content shift as the deferred block loads

description: Auto-playing, large-motion animation that ignores prefers-reduced-motion
steps: Open the motion scenario and check whether animation continues under reduced-motion
